form.formComment: Resuming after a seven months break. Finished off last preparation second of 11 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw September 7 over 1100m, on rain affected going; 1.0 len behind Poker with 57kg at $2.35. On debut second of 14 at Bendigo 2yo Mdn-Sw July 13 over 1000m, in the wet; 2.5 len behind Cannyworth carrying 58kg at $8. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Everything points to a bold return.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when ran last of 11 at Wodonga Mdn-Sw on November 28 over 1100m, 13 len behind Brenlyn's Legacy carrying 58kg at $16. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Resumes from a spell after only one run when ran last of 11 at Wodonga Mdn-Sw on November 28 over 1100m, 13 len behind Brenlyn's Legacy carrying 58kg at $16. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

form.formComment: Gelding by Royal Meeting on debut. Won a jump-out at Echuca on March 24. Well educated and brings a winning a Echuca jump-out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Royal Meeting on debut. Won a jump-out at Echuca on March 24. Well educated and brings a winning a Echuca jump-out.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 11 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1000m, 5 len behind Heidi Dancer carrying 59kg at $2.50. Last start sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 8 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1235m, 6 len behind Fiveminutewarning carrying 59kg at $8.50. Likely improver.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation seventh of 10 at Albury Mdn-Sw May 27 over 900m, on heavy track; 7 len behind Magnolia Star with 57kg at $8. Previously first up; fourth of 11 at Moonee Valley Mdn-Sw January 24 2025 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Documentary with 55.5kg at $61. Prefer to see how she returns.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide without cover for the majority of the event.
Bumped on jumping away by Stella Boo.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation second last of 10 at Seymour Mdn-Sw December 18 over 1300m, 7 len behind Brickendon carrying 57.5kg at $8.50. First up last campaign fifth of 14 at Seymour Mdn-Sw August 15 over 1000m, soft track; 7 len behind Facilitate carrying 57.5kg at $151. Will take benefit from this outing.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 900m, shifted in before being straightened by its rider.
Shortly after the start, shifted out. Bumping with Al Prancer.
Laid in under pressure in the straight.
Shifted out on jumping away and bumped Highland Belle.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 6th of 10 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, 3 len behind Outer Banks with 56.5kg at $3.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 10 at Kilmore 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 31 over 1112m, 1.3 len behind Chicago Blues carrying 56kg at $11. Is a definite chance in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Second-up. First-up after four months 6th of 10 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, 3 len behind Outer Banks with 56.5kg at $3.50. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running from approaching the 400m until near the 300m.
Held up for clear running from the 400m until passing the 200m.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming struggled in the run home; 7th of 12 at Pakenham 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 1000m, 6 len behind Bel Lupa with 54kg at $11. Second-up came from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2 len behind I'm Foxing with 57kg at $9. Is well in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Third-up today. Resuming struggled in the run home; 7th of 12 at Pakenham 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 1000m, 6 len behind Bel Lupa with 54kg at $11. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 3rd of 11 at Kyneton F&M Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1108m, slow going 2.75 len behind Finchaven carrying 58kg at $3.60. Shapes as a leading chance.
